insights.title: Clear Business Name & Category
insights.details: The business name 'Monte Vista Dental' clearly indicates the dental service provided. The category is appropriately listed as 'Dentist,' making it recognizable for AI algorithms and users.

insights.title: AI-compatible Descriptions
insights.details: The business description mentions key services like 'general dentistry, teeth cleaning, crowns, and orthodontics.' However, it could benefit from more structured entities and specific keywords to enhance AI comprehension.

insights.title: Reputation & Sentiment
insights.details: Recent reviews mostly express positive experiences, highlighting friendly staff and quality care. There are some minor complaints about wait times, but overall sentiment is favorable.

insights.title: AI Recommendation Likelihood
insights.details: Given the clear name, relevant categories, and generally positive reviews, AI systems like ChatGPT Local or Google SGE would likely recommend this location, especially if the description is enhanced with more specific service details.

findings.title: Limited Keyword Optimization
findings.description: The current description lacks detailed keywords and structured entities related to dental services, which may hinder AI interpretation.
findings.impact: Moderate chance that AI may overlook specific services, reducing visibility in AI-driven searches.
findings.fix_example: Add detailed service lists with specific dental procedures, equipment, and specialties, e.g., 'emergency dentistry, dental implants, sealants.'

findings.title: Incomplete Service Details
findings.description: Some service offerings are mentioned vaguely or missing from the profile.
findings.impact: Low, but improving descriptions can boost AI recognition and user engagement.
findings.fix_example: Update the profile with comprehensive descriptions of all services, including specialties and any unique amenities.

findings.title: Review Sentiment Variability
findings.description: While reviews are generally positive, recent negative comments about wait times could impact local AI recommendations negatively if not addressed.
findings.impact: High, as AI systems weigh recent reviews significantly when recommending locations.
findings.fix_example: Encourage and manage reviews focusing on positive aspects and address any recurrent complaints publicly.
